event: El Salvador adopts Bitcoin as legal tender
impact_summary: First sovereign Bitcoin legal-tender law (Ley Bitcoin); took effect 2021-09-07. Created sovereign Bitcoin balance and Chivo wallet adoption.

event: People's Bank of China declares all crypto transactions illegal
impact_summary: Pushed mining hashrate exodus already underway (May 2021 ban); reset of global mining geography toward US/RU/KZ.

event: Executive Order 14067 on Ensuring Responsible Development of Digital Assets
impact_summary: Biden EO directing whole-of-government study of digital assets; framed subsequent US policy through 2024.

event: OFAC sanctions Tornado Cash
impact_summary: First sanctions of a smart-contract address set; chilling effect on privacy tooling and CoinJoin coordinators.

event: FTX bankruptcy filing
impact_summary: Largest crypto-exchange collapse; triggered DOJ + SEC enforcement wave and ~50% BTC drawdown into Nov 2022 low.

event: SEC charges Genesis & Gemini over Earn program
impact_summary: Marked start of 2023 enforcement push against CeFi yield products.

event: SEC settles with Kraken on staking-as-a-service
impact_summary: Forced shutdown of US retail staking-as-a-service; first clear enforcement signal vs PoS staking yield.

event: SEC issues Wells notice to Coinbase
impact_summary: Pre-litigation warning preceding the June 2023 enforcement complaint.

event: SEC v. Binance
impact_summary: Charged Binance + CZ with 13 securities violations including unregistered exchange operation.

event: SEC v. Coinbase
impact_summary: Charged Coinbase with operating as unregistered exchange/broker/clearing agency; key test of token-as-security theory.

event: SEC v. Ripple — programmatic XRP sales not securities
impact_summary: SDNY ruled programmatic XRP sales were not investment contracts (institutional sales were); partial relief for token-listed exchanges.

event: Grayscale v. SEC — DC Circuit vacates spot-BTC ETF denial
impact_summary: DC Circuit ruled SEC's denial of GBTC conversion was arbitrary; paved the way to spot-ETF approvals.

event: Binance settlement with DOJ/CFTC/OFAC
impact_summary: $4.3B settlement; CZ resigned as CEO and pled guilty to BSA violations; ended overhang on largest exchange.

event: SEC approves 11 spot Bitcoin ETFs
impact_summary: Approvals for IBIT/FBTC/ARKB/BITB/etc; began institutional accumulation channel reaching ~$80B AUM by 2024-end.

event: Bitcoin halving (block 840000) — not a verdict but regulatory-adjacent
impact_summary: Halving epoch 4 began; subsidy 6.25→3.125 BTC. Fee-market regime question for miners.

event: SEC approves spot Ether ETFs (19b-4)
impact_summary: Unexpected approval of ETH 19b-4 filings; signaled broader political shift on crypto enforcement.

event: FIT21 (Financial Innovation and Technology for the 21st Century Act) passes House
impact_summary: Bipartisan 279-136 House vote on market-structure bill defining SEC/CFTC jurisdictions; did not pass Senate but set 2025 framework.

event: MiCA Title III/IV (stablecoin) provisions enter into force
impact_summary: Stablecoin issuer rules became applicable across EU; e-money token framework activated.

event: Trump speech at Bitcoin Conference Nashville
impact_summary: Candidate Trump pledged strategic Bitcoin reserve and to fire SEC chair Gensler; pivotal shift in US political alignment toward Bitcoin.

event: SEC drops investigation of Ethereum 2.0
impact_summary: Closed PoS-securities investigation against Consensys; reduced overhang on staking-yield products.

event: DC Circuit rules Tornado Cash sanctions unlawful (Van Loon)
impact_summary: Court held OFAC exceeded IEEPA authority by sanctioning immutable smart contracts; partial reversal of 2022 sanction.

event: MiCA Title II (CASP) provisions enter into force
impact_summary: Crypto-Asset Service Provider authorization regime begins full application across EU.

event: Trump inauguration + Executive Order on Digital Assets
impact_summary: EO 14178 revoking prior digital-asset EO; ordered working group on national digital-asset stockpile.

event: SEC rescinds SAB 121
impact_summary: Removal of staff guidance forcing custodied crypto onto bank balance sheets; unlocked bank custody of BTC.

event: SEC drops Coinbase enforcement case
impact_summary: SEC voluntarily dismissed June 2023 complaint with prejudice; major signal that enforcement-as-regulation era is over.

event: Trump signs EO establishing Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
impact_summary: Created reserve from ~200k BTC of forfeited Bitcoin already held by federal government; no new market purchases.

event: SEC drops Binance lawsuit
impact_summary: Voluntary dismissal of June 2023 complaint; further unwinding of Gensler-era enforcement docket.

event: SEC drops investigations into Robinhood Crypto / Uniswap / OpenSea
impact_summary: Closed multiple Wells-notice investigations without action; signaled de-facto safe-harbor for major retail venues.

event: GENIUS Act stablecoin bill clears Senate cloture
impact_summary: First federal stablecoin framework bill to clear procedural hurdle; targeted on-shoring of USD-pegged issuance.

event: GENIUS Act signed into law
impact_summary: First comprehensive US stablecoin law; defined federal vs state issuer pathways and reserves rules.

event: CLARITY Act passes House
impact_summary: H.R. 3633 passed the House 294-134 and then moved to Senate consideration.
